name: Badge
visual_summary: A small component used to display a badge or notification. It is typically used to display additional information or context related to a specific action or state. A developer would use the Badge component to indicate a change in status or to draw attention to a specific piece of information.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready component component with the following characteristics:

Name: Badge
Description: A small component used to display a badge or notification. It is typically used to display additional information or context related to a specific action or state. A developer would use the Badge component to indicate a change in status or to draw attention to a specific piece of information.
Style: e.g. dark, minimal
Interactions: 
Tags: icon, notification, indicator

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
